summary: Excellent audience recording captures a historic, high‑energy show that fans describe as an unforgettable good time.
review: The concert is hailed as a historic event with an incredible performance that left the crowd ecstatic. The audience (AUD) recording is praised for its crisp, well‑balanced sound—B+K's “eating up” the audio perfectly—making it one of the best 90s audience tapes. Overall, listeners give the show five stars and recommend it highly.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 5‑star ratings and enthusiastically praised both the performance and the audience recording, indicating an outstanding show with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced sound; B+K speakers enhance clarity; described as one of the best 90s AUDs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the concert as a historic, feel‑good event with great energy and a consistently strong set throughout.
